intro: Pseudoroegneria ninae, also known as Ninae's wheat grass or Tibetan wheat grass, is a type of grass belonging to the genus Pseudoroegneria. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against oxidative stress.
